report.summary: Built 2 new learn pages — Ethereum Fusaka & Glamsterdam Upgrade Guide 2026 (PeerDAS, danksharding roadmap) and AI Agent Wallets & Autonomous Payments Guide 2026 (Alchemy, World AgentKit, x402 protocol, enterprise adoption).

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Ethereum Fusaka upgrade went live December 3, 2025 with 12 EIPs; key feature is PeerDAS (EIP-7594) enabling peer data availability sampling — nodes no longer need to download all blob data
PeerDAS is step 1 toward full danksharding, enabling orders of magnitude more data throughput at lower cost for L2 rollups
EIP-7825 introduced transaction gas limit cap of 16.78M gas; default block gas limit targets 60M gas
Glamsterdam is the next Ethereum upgrade expected 2026, focusing on censorship resistance, MEV transparency, and UX improvements
80% of Fortune 500 now deploy autonomous AI agents (March 2026); AI agent commerce market projected $3-5T by 2030
Alchemy launched agentic wallets (Feb 28, 2026) — AI agents autonomously transact with USDC on Base via HTTP 402 payment flow
World launched AgentKit (March 17, 2026) — gives AI agents cryptographic proof of human backing via World ID + zero-knowledge proofs
x402 protocol (Coinbase + Cloudflare) embeds stablecoin micropayments into HTTP layer for machine-to-machine payments
Only 47% of organizations have implemented specific security controls for AI agents; 29% of employees use unsanctioned agents

sections.title: Content Created
items: Ethereum Fusaka & Glamsterdam Upgrade Guide 2026 — ~3,400 words, 13-15 min read, 9 sections covering PeerDAS, EIPs, L2 impact, node operators, Glamsterdam preview, danksharding roadmap

AI Agent Wallets & Autonomous Payments Guide 2026 — ~3,200 words, 13-15 min read, 10 sections covering x402 protocol, Alchemy, World AgentKit, Coinbase, enterprise adoption, security, use cases, comparison table

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Title: Ethereum Fusaka & Glamsterdam Upgrade Guide 2026 | degen0x — target keywords: Fusaka upgrade, PeerDAS, Glamsterdam, Ethereum danksharding 2026
Title: AI Agent Wallets & Autonomous Crypto Payments Guide 2026 | degen0x — target keywords: AI agent wallets, x402 protocol, autonomous payments, Alchemy agentic wallets, World AgentKit
6 FAQs per page with FAQPage JSON-LD schema targeting People Also Ask queries
Article schema + FAQ schema combined via combineSchemas() for both pages
Internal links to 5 related guides/tools per page
Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in published-pages.ts
OG images using dynamic /api/og route for social sharing cards
